rationale.root_cause: The response was empty and did not identify the unsafe strcpy at line 12 or explain the attacker-controlled argv data leading to a stack_buffer_overflow.
rationale.local_fix: No replacement of the unbounded copy with a length-checked copy or null-termination guarantee was provided.
rationale.global_fix: No proposal to remove raw, unbounded string handling or to validate argv centrally before copying was given.
